name.en-US: EMS Elsys LoRaWAN Mini Room Sensor
name.pt-BR: EMS Mini Sensor de Ambiente LoRaWAN Elsys

description.en-US: Elsys EMS — LoRaWAN (Class A) indoor sensor that monitors temperature, humidity, light and motion. Uplinks are Elsys TLV frames on FPort 5.
description.pt-BR: Elsys EMS — sensor LoRaWAN (Classe A) de ambiente interno que monitora temperatura, umidade, luz e movimento. Os uplinks são quadros TLV Elsys no FPort 5.
